prompt: Create a vertical ultra-detailed fantasy product shot of a gothic lolita kimono girl rendered as an Edo Kiriko cut-glass sculpture. The subject is an elegant unnamed glasswork maiden, shown in graceful side profile facing left, holding a long red-and-black kiseru pipe near her lips with a small curling translucent smoke trail. She has glossy black glass hair with deep crimson streaks, blunt bangs, long side locks, and an elaborate floral-and-ribbon hair ornament made from faceted crystal, metal filigree, dangling beads, and red accents. Her skin should look like milky translucent porcelain glass. She wears a lavish gothic kimono in black, sapphire blue, clear crystal, gold, and crimson, with wide sleeves, open back, lace-like black filigree, gold floral inlay, red rose motifs, and dense triangular prism facets that refract light like cut crystal. Surround her with a large circular transparent glass halo engraved with Edo Kiriko geometric starburst patterns, plus exactly 7 prominent decorative flower elements: one large red crystal flower at lower left, three red rose-like flowers on the kimono hem and sleeve, one blue-black flower near the shoulder, one silver flower hair ornament, and one pale pink crystal flower at mid-right. Add sharp lotus-like blue crystal shards rising around the base and glittering star ornaments, all made of glass. Place the figure on a glossy black octagonal lacquer display pedestal with fine gold geometric and floral line art. Background: a softly blurred traditional Japanese room with shoji windows, warm wooden interior, golden afternoon light, shallow depth of field, and sparkling bokeh reflections. Visual style: exquisite anime-inspired collectible figurine, luxury glass craft, hyperreal transparent refraction, intricate faceted caustics, iridescent highlights, high contrast, cinematic warm lighting, 9:16 composition, centered full-body statue, no visible text, no watermark.
